title: BSD Regulator and Leading Coefficient v2

analysis.object: T513: BSD Regulator and Leading Coefficient v2 depth analysis

regulator_det.description: Regulator = det of height pairing matrix; EML-2 linear algebra
regulator_det.reason: Deltad=+2 from discrete rank count to continuous volume

leading_coeff.reason: All terms except Sha are EML-2 computable

sha_obstruction.description: Sha(E) finiteness unproven for rank>=2; EML-inf unknown
sha_obstruction.reason: Sha is EML-inf object; cardinality is EML-2 shadow only

analysis.theorem: T513: BSD Regulator and Leading Coefficient v2 (S792).

key_theorem: T513: BSD Regulator and Leading Coefficient v2 (S792).
